---
title: "AI-AIR — Applied Innovative AI Research Lab"
subtitle: "Director: Niloofar Yousefi · University of Central Florida"
description: "AI-AIR develops AI and machine learning methods for scientific and biomedical applications: drug discovery, bioinformatics, generative AI for science, and AI-guided nanomedicine."
---

## About AI-AIR

The **Applied Innovative Artificial Intelligence Research Lab**, **AI-AIR**, directed by Dr. Niloofar Yousefi, develops **artificial intelligence and machine learning methods for high-impact scientific and societal applications**. The lab's research spans AI/ML, drug discovery, bioinformatics, computational social science, human-centered AI, generative AI for science, and AI-guided nanomedicine.

## Director

::: {.bm-person-card}
::: {.bm-person-photo}
![Headshot of Niloofar Yousefi](../assets/people/niloofar-yousefi.jpeg)
:::
### Niloofar Yousefi
[Assistant Professor, IEMS · UCF]{.bm-person-role}
[Director, AI-AIR]{.bm-person-affil}

Research in machine learning, AI, statistical learning theory, bioinformatics, drug discovery, generative AI for science, AI-guided nanomedicine, and agent-based modeling.

::: {.bm-person-links}
[Profile](../people/faculty.qmd#niloofar-yousefi)
[Email](mailto:niloofar.yousefi@ucf.edu)
[UCF profile](https://www.cecs.ucf.edu/faculty/niloofar-yousefi/)
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DsciMcMAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::
:::

## Connection to BioMIND

Within BioMIND, AI-AIR contributes **applied machine learning and biomedical AI expertise** for accelerating biological discovery, therapeutic innovation, and scientific AI systems.

## Research themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Machine learning
Algorithmic and statistical foundations, with emphasis on reliable, applicable ML.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Artificial intelligence
General AI methods applied to scientific and biomedical problems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Bioinformatics
ML and statistical methods for genomic, proteomic, and biomedical data.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-guided drug discovery
Predictive, generative, and prioritization methods for therapeutic design.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### AI-guided nanomedicine
AI methods for the design and evaluation of nanomedicines.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Generative AI for science
LLM and diffusion-based generation for hypothesis generation and design.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Statistical learning theory
Theoretical guarantees and complexity-based bounds for modern ML.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Agent-based modeling
Simulation of heterogeneous agents in social and biological systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Human-centered AI
Cross-thrust collaboration with Human-CAIR on responsible AI.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Computational social science
Data-driven and simulation-based study of collective behavior.
:::

:::

## Current student research

AI-AIR-affiliated student research includes **reliable learning for biological datasets**, **weak supervision and distribution shift**, **biomedical AI**, **RNA-seq interpretation**, **uncertainty-aware LLMs**, **trustworthy AI**, and **AI-guided scientific discovery**.

Current students working with AI-AIR include [Mehrdad Shoeibi](../people/students.qmd), [Tasfia Nuzhat](../people/students.qmd), and [Elias Hossain](../people/students.qmd).

## People

AI-AIR members are listed centrally on the BioMIND [People](../people/index.qmd) page.

## Publications and news

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) and [News](../news/index.qmd) pages for AI-AIR contributions.
